  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b10)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (clear b3)
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
